pages.raw_text:
Everett G. Griggs. president of
the Pacific Coast Lumbermen S as
ISOLATION and head of the st. Paul
& Tacoma lumber Co. and the Ia
coma Country club. has accepted
an invitation from E. F. Cartier
Van Dissel, grand marshal, to ride
as one of the guards of honor in
the parade of progress in connec-
ton with the seventeenth session
of the national irrigation congress
In Spokane, August to IA. John
ID. Farrell and former Governor
John McGraw, both of Seattle, will
also take part.


The parade of progress on Au-
gust II will show the development
of the northwest from the advent
of Captains Lewis and Clark to the
present day, and it is expected that
10000 uniformed marchers, headed
by mands of music, will be in line
in the parades of the industrial
and irriagtion army on August 10
and II.
